title: Homeland Security
text:
Search All Events
Enter Search Term(s)
Year
Topics
Items / Page
Secretary Kristi Noem Provides an Update on Border Security and Drug Seizure Efforts
U.S. Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem will hold a press conference highlighting the Trump Administration's historic border security and drug seizure efforts.
Secretary Noem Hosts Press Conference in Tampa, Florida
Secretary Noem Hosts Press Conference in Tampa, Florida at Tampa International Airport on December 8, 2025.
Secretary Noem to Host Press Conference at Border Wall with El Paso Sector in Santa Teresa, NM
U.S. Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem will host a press conference with U.S. Border Patrol at the U.S.-Mexico border wall located in Santa Teresa, New Mexico.
Secretary Noem to Host Press Conference Exposing “Worst of the Worst” Criminal Illegal Aliens in IL
DHS Secretary Kristi Noem hosts a press conference in Chicago, Illinois exposing the “worst of the worst” criminal illegal aliens arrested by the Department under President Donald J. Trump’s leadership.
Secretary Noem Hosts Press Conference to Provide Updates on the Shooting of Customs and Border Protection Officer
DHS Secretary Kristi Noem will deliver an update in New York following the July 19 shooting of an off-duty U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) officer during what appears to have been an attempted robbery.
Secretary Noem to Host Press Conference Exposing “Worst of the Worst” Criminal Illegal Aliens in Tennessee
U.S. Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem will host a press conference in Nashville, Tennessee exposing the “worst of the worst” criminal illegal aliens arrested by the Department under President Donald J. Trump’s leadership in the Volunteer State.
U.S. Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem to Host Press Conference at Nashville International Airport
Secretary Noem is hosting a press conference at the Nashville International Airport to highlight the opening of an Honor Lane – a special TSA security lane designated exclusively for military members and their families.
Secretary Noem to Expose “Worst of the Worst” Criminal Illegal Aliens Arrested by ICE
U.S. Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem gives remarks and hosts a press conference in Tampa, Florida exposing the “worst of the worst” criminal illegal aliens arrested by the Department of Homeland Security under President Donald J. Trump’s leadership.
Secretary Noem Hosts Press Conference at Ronald Reagan National Airport
Secretary Kristi Noem announces a new policy from TSA that makes screening easier for passengers, improves traveler satisfaction, and reduces wait times.
Signing of the MOU on the Joint Security Program
Livestream for the signing of the MOU on the Joint Security Program.
